name: vibinet
description: Deterministic input-synced netcode engine for real-time games.

scripts.build:types: npx tsc src/client.ts --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir ../devs/dist --module ESNext --moduleResolution bundler --target ESNext --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --allowImportingTsExtensions
scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:types
